meaning: n.到麦加朝圣过的伊斯兰教徒
examples: She boasted to classmates about her relationship with then Bolton footballer el Hadji Diouf.
Indeed, events at Ewood Park led to the strange scenario of actually cheering an El Hadji Diouf goal.
EL Hadji Diouf has been invited to train with Preston - but North End boss Phil Brown claims he can't afford to sign him.
And the fiery striker was scathing in his criticism when the award went to Morocco's Mustapha Hadji.
El-Hadji Diouf received a needless booking for dissent on 16 minutes, as the match became ever more competitive.
